world_cues.reason: zone conditions, darkness, weak light and scarce practical resources continued to shape choices

attention.reason: Anya's salience narrowed around delay and timing; Rita stayed anchored on visible result; Nikita focused on repairable action

appraisal.reason: the same delay was appraised more harshly after baseline continuity, especially by Anya

state_update.reason: stress, mood, fatigue and relation values shifted through the repeated promise pattern

memory_activation.reason: baseline continuity actively shaped readings of the repeated promise, but memory_imprints.json files were still not synced back

relationship_dynamics.reason: trust, resentment and affinity moved further after a second partially fulfilled promise

action_pulls.reason: characters were pulled toward checking, naming the gap, compensating, and then containing escalation

notes: Baseline smoke/probe executed without episode injection.
Run stopped early because the shelter reached a stable overnight regime and further ticks likely would have been low-information drift.
ep01 injected afterward as targeted late-evening delta over baseline continuity.
Post-injection continuation stopped when the room reached a stable temporary interpretation of the repeated promise pattern.
unresolved_issues: No explicit campaign/run cast state mirror was updated beyond runtime world_state and logs; cast source files remain pre-run baselines.
Memory activation was used behaviorally from continuity and relation context, but not persisted back into memory_imprints.json during this smoke run.

The world still lists one charged battery in resources while the lantern is described as weak but managed; this reflects that a charged unit exists in inventory accounting but not as a fresh independent spare available for easy swap, and could use clearer object/resource modeling later.
